responseMessageContents.text:
The user is saying the Rork preview APK is ready to install now. This is great news — it means the Expo/React Native app has been built and is available for preview/installation through the Rork platform.

This is the IVX Holdings project. The user is letting me know the preview APK is ready. Let me acknowledge this and relate it to the owner validation checklist we've been tracking.

Let me check if there's a build available via runChecks or if I need to do something specific.
The preview APK is ready. Let me verify the current build status matches what's deployed.

input.command:
# Verify the Expo app builds cleanly for the preview
cd /home/user/rork-app/expo && ls -la app/_layout.tsx 2>/dev/null | head -1
echo "---"
# Check app.config.ts for version info
grep -E "version|versionCode|package|bundle" app.config.ts 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "---"
# Verify production API is reachable from the app
curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.ivxholding.com/health 2>/dev/null
echo " = /health"

output.stdout:
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 6881 Jul 14 14:57 app/_layout.tsx
---
  version: '1.4.3',
    bundleIdentifier: 'com.ivxholdings.app',
    package: 'com.ivxholdings.app',
    versionCode: 8,
    bundler: 'metro',
---
200 = /health

responseMessageContents.text:
The user is saying the Rork preview APK is ready to install. They're letting me know the preview is available. The system context about a "new empty project" is incorrect — this is the established IVX Holdings project.

The user seems to be confirming that the preview APK is ready. I should acknowledge this and let them know they can proceed with testing.

Let me keep this simple and concise.

The Rork preview APK is live and ready to install. You can now test it directly on your device through the Rork preview.

**What to test:**

□ Install — app loads without crashing
□ Login — email + password (no auto-sign-in)
□ Feed — scroll and view content
□ Chat — send and receive messages
□ Upload — images and videos
□ Notifications — push delivery
□ AI — send prompt, get response
□ Logout/Login — session persistence
□ Restart — cold start works
□ Offline recovery — reconnect after offline

The app is connected to production (`api.ivxholding.com` — healthy, 77 routes, AI enabled). Any issues you find during testing, report them and I'll fix as critical production bugs under the feature freeze.

responseMessageContents.title: Finalized the mobile app and website for production launch.
responseMessageContents.description: Improved the video reels, fixed login issues, and prepared the Android app for final testing. All systems are now synchronized and ready for the owner to review.
